message:
feat(middleware): add HTTP Cache-Control middleware with builder API

Implement comprehensive Cache-Control header support per RFC 7234 with
a fluent builder API for constructing cache policies.

CacheDirective enum supports all standard directives:
- public/private: Cache visibility
- no-store/no-cache: Caching restrictions
- must-revalidate/proxy-revalidate: Revalidation requirements
- stale-while-revalidate/stale-if-error: Stale content policies
- immutable: Content that won't change during freshness lifetime

CacheControlBuilder provides ergonomic construction:
- max_age_secs(): Browser cache duration
- s_maxage_secs(): CDN/proxy cache duration
- stale_while_revalidate_secs(): Background revalidation window
- Chainable methods for all directives

Example usage patterns:
- Static assets: public, immutable, long max-age
- API responses: private, no-store for sensitive data
- CDN-optimized: public with separate max-age and s-maxage

Also includes router trie updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
